reasoning: At 4x the mace reads clearly as a holy/divine weapon with a distinct crown-like ornate head, blue shaft, and orange-gold flame/gem top — decent personality. Dark bg contrast is strong; the light shaft and warm accent pop well. Light bg (4th panel) reveals the issue: the pale-blue handle bleeds into the cream background, losing definition along the shaft edges. At 1x the silhouette collapses to a thin stick with a vague blob head — identifiable as 'weapon on a stick' but the holy character evaporates. Charm is present (rounded top cluster, warm+cool color combo, toy-scepter vibe) but not distinctive enough to pass the sticker test — it reads more as competent pixel art than an instantly lovable icon. Needs either a darker outline on the handle for light-bg legibility or a warmer/bolder handle color, plus slightly more exaggerated head-to-shaft size ratio to survive 1x.
